title: Create a new project from the Dashboard and open the Editor
description: Verifies a user can create a project from the Dashboard and reach the Editor view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill text into the project name field with Test Project 001
Submit the create project action
Verify the editor layout is displayed with an asset sidebar, a canvas area, and a scene list

title: Project name is required when creating a project
description: Verifies the Dashboard prevents creating a project when the name is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill text into the project name field with
Submit the create project action
Verify a required-name validation error is visible

title: Dashboard primary content loads when no project exists
description: Verifies the Dashboard shows its primary new-project entry point.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the dashboard shows a new project creation card

title: Editor primary layout loads
description: Verifies the Editor shows the core regions after a project is created.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill text into the project name field with Test Project 002
Submit the create project action
Verify the editor layout is displayed with an asset sidebar, a canvas area, and a scene list

title: Canvas selection and transform handles appear for an added canvas element
description: Verifies selecting an element on the canvas shows selection/transform controls.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill text into the project name field with Test Project 003
Submit the create project action
Drag and drop an image file from the OS onto the canvas
Click the newly added canvas element
Verify the selected canvas element shows selection or transform handles

title: Unsupported file types are rejected when dropped onto the canvas
description: Verifies dragging an unsupported file onto the canvas does not add a new element.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill text into the project name field with Test Project 004
Submit the create project action
Drag and drop an unsupported file type from the OS onto the canvas
Verify no new canvas element is added

title: Asset sidebar can add a local folder and display filtered assets
description: Verifies selecting a local folder populates the asset list in the sidebar.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill text into the project name field with Test Project 005
Submit the create project action
Click the add folder control in the asset sidebar
Select a local folder in the folder picker
Verify a list of assets is displayed in the asset sidebar

title: Drag an asset from the sidebar onto the canvas adds a canvas element
description: Verifies an asset can be dragged from the sidebar into the canvas to create an element.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill text into the project name field with Test Project 006
Submit the create project action
Click the add folder control in the asset sidebar
Select a local folder in the folder picker
Drag an asset from the asset sidebar onto the canvas
Verify a new canvas element appears

title: Canceling folder selection does not add assets to the sidebar
description: Verifies canceling the folder picker leaves the asset sidebar unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill text into the project name field with Test Project 007
Submit the create project action
Click the add folder control in the asset sidebar
Cancel the folder picker
Verify no assets are added to the asset sidebar

title: Add and activate a new scene from the scene list
description: Verifies a user can add a new scene and make it active so the canvas updates to that scene.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to add a new scene in the horizontal scene list
Click the newly added scene in the scene list to make it active
Verify the canvas updates to reflect the newly active scene

title: Reorder scenes via drag-and-drop in the scene list
description: Verifies scenes can be reordered in the horizontal scene list and the new order persists visually.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to add a new scene in the horizontal scene list
Click the control to add another new scene in the horizontal scene list
Drag the last scene in the scene list to the first position
Verify the visual order of scenes in the list reflects the new arrangement

title: Toggle transition type between two scenes
description: Verifies the transition badge between scenes can be toggled and the chosen transition is reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to add a new scene in the horizontal scene list
Click the transition badge between two adjacent scenes
Verify the transition type indicator between the scenes changes

title: Add a black-screen pause and preview it on the canvas
description: Verifies a black-screen active pause can be inserted and previewed by selecting its block in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to add a pause in the scene list
Choose the black-screen pause option from the pause menu
Click the newly added pause block in the scene list
Verify the canvas displays a full-canvas pause preview

title: Pause duration is not editable after creation (black-screen pause)
description: Verifies that after creating a pause, the UI does not allow changing its duration.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to add a pause in the scene list
Choose the black-screen pause option from the pause menu
Click the pause block in the scene list
Attempt to change the pause duration using any available duration control in the timeline/UI
Verify no duration editing control is available or any attempted change is not applied

title: Preview VHS pause on the canvas
description: Verifies a VHS active pause can be inserted and previews as an animated noise effect on the canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to add a pause in the scene list
Choose the VHS pause option from the pause menu
Click the VHS pause block in the scene list to preview it
Verify a VHS-style noise animation fills the canvas during preview

title: Solid-color pause fills the canvas during preview
description: Verifies a solid-color active pause can be added and displays as a full-canvas solid color when selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to add a pause in the scene list
Choose the solid-color pause option from the pause menu
Click the solid-color pause block in the scene list to preview it
Verify the canvas displays a full-canvas solid color pause preview

title: Pause duration is not editable after creation (solid-color pause)
description: Verifies that a solid-color pause duration cannot be modified after it is created.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to add a pause in the scene list
Choose the solid-color pause option from the pause menu
Click the pause block in the scene list
Attempt to change the pause duration using any available duration control in the timeline/UI
Verify no duration editing control is available or any attempted change is not applied

title: Element timeline appears after adding an element and supports start/end handle edits
description: Verifies the element timeline panel appears when a scene has elements and adjusting handles changes the element visibility window.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Add a text element to the active scene's canvas
Verify the element timeline panel is displayed below the canvas
Drag the left handle of the element track to adjust the start time
Drag the right handle of the element track to adjust the end time
Verify the element visibility updates according to the adjusted start and end times

title: Element timeline is absent or shows empty state when scene has no elements
description: Verifies the UI does not show element tracks when the active scene contains no elements.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to add a new scene in the horizontal scene list
Click the newly added scene to make it active
Verify the element timeline panel is not shown or an empty state is displayed for a scene with no elements

title: Open the Lettering panel from the editor header
description: Verifies the user can open the lettering panel from the main page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header control to open the lettering panel
Verify the lettering panel is displayed

title: Add text, style it, animate it, and split into individual characters
description: Verifies a full lettering workflow from adding text to splitting it into per-character elements on the canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header control to open the lettering panel
Click the control to add a text element to the canvas
Fill text into the text field with Test Split Text
Select a different font family from the font dropdown
Adjust the font size via the font size slider
Pick a new text color via the color picker
Select an animation effect other than none
Click the control to split the text into individual letters
Verify the canvas displays the text as individual character elements

title: Prevent adding text when no active scene is selected
description: Verifies the app prompts the user to select or create an active scene before adding text.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header control to open the lettering panel
Click the control to add a text element to the canvas
Verify a prompt is shown to select or create an active scene before adding text

title: Change font family for an existing text element
description: Verifies changing the font dropdown updates the selected text element.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header control to open the lettering panel
Click the control to add a text element to the canvas
Fill text into the text field with Font Swap
Select a different font family from the font dropdown
Verify the canvas shows the text with the newly selected font family

title: Adjust font size for an existing text element
description: Verifies changing the font size slider updates the selected text element size.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header control to open the lettering panel
Click the control to add a text element to the canvas
Fill text into the text field with Size Change
Adjust the font size via the font size slider
Verify the canvas shows the text at the updated size

title: Change text color using the color picker
description: Verifies the color picker updates the selected text element color on the canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header control to open the lettering panel
Click the control to add a text element to the canvas
Fill text into the text field with Color Change
Pick a new text color via the color picker
Verify the canvas shows the text in the newly selected color

title: Switch animation effect between options
description: Verifies selecting a different animation effect updates the selected text element animation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header control to open the lettering panel
Click the control to add a text element to the canvas
Fill text into the text field with Animate Me
Select an animation effect
Select a different animation effect
Verify the selected text element reflects the most recently chosen animation effect

title: Split only after text exists in the text field
description: Verifies the split action is prevented or blocked when there is no text to split.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header control to open the lettering panel
Click the control to add a text element to the canvas
Fill text into the text field with
Click the control to split the text into individual letters
Verify the app prevents splitting and shows an inline validation or disabled-action state
